structured_payload_candidate.title: Temperature Control - Cooling Mode
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In cooling mode, the cooling loop output resets the cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum to cooling maximum; the cold duct damper modulates to maintain measured airflow at setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is cooling
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: The Cooling Loop output shall reset the active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is cooling, the Cooling Loop output shall reset the active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint.

evidence_quote: When the Zone State is cooling, the Cooling Loop output shall reset the active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint.
evidence_text: When the Zone State is cooling, the Cooling Loop output shall reset the active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Temperature Control - Cooling Mode with Cold Duct SAT > Room Temp
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If cold duct supply air temperature is greater than room temperature, the cold duct airflow setpoint is limited to the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Cold duct supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: The active cold duct supply airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If cold duct supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active cold duct supply airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

evidence_quote: If cold duct supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active cold duct supply airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.
evidence_text: If cold duct supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active cold duct supply airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Temperature Control - Deadband Mode
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In deadband mode, the cold duct airflow setpoint is set to minimum and the cold duct damper modulates to maintain that airflow; the hot duct damper is closed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is deadband
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: The active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.
evidence_text: When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Temperature Control - Heating Mode
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In heating mode, the heating loop output resets the hot duct airflow setpoint from zero to heating maximum; the hot duct damper modulates to maintain that airflow; the cooling damper maintains total airflow at minimum.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is heating
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: The heating-loop output shall reset the active hot duct airflow setpoint from zero to the heating maximum endpoint. The hot duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured hot duct airflow at the active hot duct airflow setpoint. The cooling damper shall be controlled to maintain the sum of the measured inlet airflows at the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is heating, the heating-loop output shall reset the active hot duct airflow setpoint from zero to the heating maximum endpoint. The hot duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured hot duct airflow at the active hot duct airflow setpoint. The cooling damper shall be controlled to maintain the sum of the measured inlet airflows at the minimum endpoint.

evidence_quote: When the Zone State is heating, the heating-loop output shall reset the active hot duct airflow setpoint from zero to the heating maximum endpoint. The hot duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured hot duct airflow at the active hot duct airflow setpoint. The cooling damper shall be controlled to maintain the sum of the measured inlet airflows at the minimum endpoint.
evidence_text: When the Zone State is heating, the heating-loop output shall reset the active hot duct airflow setpoint from zero to the heating maximum endpoint. The hot duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured hot duct airflow at the active hot duct airflow setpoint. The cooling damper shall be controlled to maintain the sum of the measured inlet airflows at the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Temperature Control - Heating Mode with Hot Duct SAT < Room Temp

structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: The active hot duct airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

evidence_text: If hot-deck supply air temperature from air handler is less than room temperature, the active hot duct airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.summary: Low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for zones with Importance-Multiplier of 0 for static pressure reset T&R control loop.

structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send 3 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests.

evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests.
evidence_text: If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Hot-Duct Static Pressure Reset Request - 2 Requests
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Send 2 requests if measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint while setpoint > 0 and damper position > 95% for 1 minute.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send 2 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Else if the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 2 requests.

evidence_text: Else if the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 2 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Hot-Duct Static Pressure Reset Request - 1 Request
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Send 1 request if damper position is greater than 95%, until damper position is less than 85%.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Damper position is greater than 95%
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send 1 request until the damper position is less than 85%.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Else if the damper position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the damper position is less than 85%.

evidence_quote: Else if the damper position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the damper position is less than 85%.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Active endpoints used in the control logic
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Active endpoints vary by Zone Group mode: Occupied uses Vcool-max, Vmin, Vheat-max; Cooldown uses Vcool-max; Setup uses Vcool-max; Warmup uses Vheat-max; Setback uses Vheat-max; Unoccupied uses none.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Use the endpoints from Table 5.12.4 based on Zone Group mode.
